items.title: S01E01 - Pilot
items.summary: Zoe Bean and her three high-school pals come of age in New York City.

infolabels.title: Pilot
infolabels.plot: Zoe Bean and her three high-school pals come of age in New York City.

items.title: S01E02 - Everything You Wanted to Know About Zoe
items.summary: Iris turns into an overprotective mother when Zoe contemplates becoming intimate with a boy.

infolabels.title: Everything You Wanted to Know About Zoe
infolabels.plot: Iris turns into an overprotective mother when Zoe contemplates becoming intimate with a boy.

items.title: S01E03 - When Zoe Met Johnny
items.summary: Zoe and Jack battle over the attention of prep-school friend Johnny; Duncan and Jane pose as a couple.

infolabels.title: When Zoe Met Johnny
infolabels.plot: Zoe and Jack battle over the attention of prep-school friend Johnny; Duncan and Jane pose as a couple.

items.title: S01E04 - To Jack, from Zoe
items.summary: Jane finds an unsent valentine from Zoe to Jack; Breeny Kennedy chooses Duncan as her valentine.

infolabels.title: To Jack, from Zoe
infolabels.plot: Jane finds an unsent valentine from Zoe to Jack; Breeny Kennedy chooses Duncan as her valentine.

items.title: S01E05 - Sympathy for Jack
items.summary: Jack's new girlfriend is unfaithful; the girl Duncan asks out has a jealous ex.

infolabels.title: Sympathy for Jack
infolabels.plot: Jack's new girlfriend is unfaithful; the girl Duncan asks out has a jealous ex.

items.title: S01E06 - Hard Cheese on Zoe
items.summary: Zoe's summer camp reunion is a time for her to shine -- if she doesn't let Jane ruin it.

infolabels.title: Hard Cheese on Zoe
infolabels.plot: Zoe's summer camp reunion is a time for her to shine -- if she doesn't let Jane ruin it.

items.title: S01E07 - The Trouble with Jane
items.summary: Jane tags along when Zoe hangs out with an adventurous new girl in school.

infolabels.title: The Trouble with Jane
infolabels.plot: Jane tags along when Zoe hangs out with an adventurous new girl in school.

items.title: S01E08 - A Good Man is Hard to Find
items.summary: No one believes Zoe when she tells them about her romance with a hunk.

infolabels.title: A Good Man is Hard to Find
infolabels.plot: No one believes Zoe when she tells them about her romance with a hunk.

items.title: S01E09 - The Advice
items.summary: Zoe gives Duncan advice about his girlfriend and bossy mother; Jack and Jane contend with a crafty candy striper.

infolabels.title: The Advice
infolabels.plot: Zoe gives Duncan advice about his girlfriend and bossy mother; Jack and Jane contend with a crafty candy striper.

items.title: S01E10 - Under Mom's Thumb
items.summary: Zoe ensures romantic success for her mother and her mother's new date.

infolabels.title: Under Mom's Thumb
infolabels.plot: Zoe ensures romantic success for her mother and her mother's new date.

items.title: S01E11 - Down and Out at Bleecker and Houston
items.summary: Duncan finds a kinky female caller on the line when he answers a subway phone.

infolabels.title: Down and Out at Bleecker and Houston
infolabels.plot: Duncan finds a kinky female caller on the line when he answers a subway phone.

items.title: S01E12 - Zoe Under the Influence
items.summary: Zoe aspires to become a writer with the help of a romance novelist, Jane tries to impress a boy by trying to take an interest in his religion, and Duncan volunteers for the Very Exceptional Games, however, he starts competing and winning every race.

infolabels.title: Zoe Under the Influence
infolabels.plot: Zoe aspires to become a writer with the help of a romance novelist, Jane tries to impress a boy by trying to take an interest in his religion, and Duncan volunteers for the Very Exceptional Games, however, he starts competing and winning every race.

items.title: S01E13 - Run, Man Ray, Run
items.summary: Zoe seeks fame by befriending a semi-famous soap-opera star.

infolabels.title: Run, Man Ray, Run
infolabels.plot: Zoe seeks fame by befriending a semi-famous soap-opera star.

items.title: S02E01 - Three Years Later (aka No Good Deed)
items.summary: Zoe, Duncan, Jack and Jane have started college in New York City and are living on their own, Zoe waiting tables at a Chinese restaurant while attending Columbia. First up: Zoe is concerned that their friendship is in trouble as they start living separate lives.

infolabels.title: Three Years Later (aka No Good Deed)
infolabels.plot: Zoe, Duncan, Jack and Jane have started college in New York City and are living on their own, Zoe waiting tables at a Chinese restaurant while attending Columbia. First up: Zoe is concerned that their friendship is in trouble as they start living separate lives.

items.title: S02E02 - The Customer is Always Vic
items.summary: Zoe gets a shot at being a manager at the restaurant where she works, but first she has to handle a night with only half a staff. Her solution: recruit Duncan, Jack and Jane to help her out.

infolabels.title: The Customer is Always Vic
infolabels.plot: Zoe gets a shot at being a manager at the restaurant where she works, but first she has to handle a night with only half a staff. Her solution: recruit Duncan, Jack and Jane to help her out.

items.title: S02E03 - I Don't Feel So Good
items.summary: Zoe helps sickly Jane complete a photography assignment; Duncan and Jack get an apartment in a building full of supermodels.

infolabels.title: I Don't Feel So Good
infolabels.plot: Zoe helps sickly Jane complete a photography assignment; Duncan and Jack get an apartment in a building full of supermodels.

items.title: S02E04 - Kiss of Death
items.summary: Zoe's date dumps her, then tells people that she is a terrible kisser.

infolabels.title: Kiss of Death
infolabels.plot: Zoe's date dumps her, then tells people that she is a terrible kisser.

items.title: S02E05 - The Feud
items.summary: Obnoxious brothers move into Zoe's apartment building; Jack and Doug buy tickets from a scalper.

infolabels.title: The Feud
infolabels.plot: Obnoxious brothers move into Zoe's apartment building; Jack and Doug buy tickets from a scalper.

items.title: S02E06 - A Midsummer Night's Nightmare
items.summary: Zoe tells Jane about a dream she had about Jack kissing her. She then kisses Jack but feels nothing. Jack then feels something and wants to kiss Zoe again.

infolabels.title: A Midsummer Night's Nightmare
infolabels.plot: Zoe tells Jane about a dream she had about Jack kissing her. She then kisses Jack but feels nothing. Jack then feels something and wants to kiss Zoe again.

items.title: S02E07 - Crossing the Line
items.summary: When Zoe and the gang crash Jane's boss's wild costume party, complete with a live, tiger, Zoe's evil co-worker Penny uses the prank to get Jane fired, and it's up to Zoe to get her friend's job back.

infolabels.title: Crossing the Line
infolabels.plot: When Zoe and the gang crash Jane's boss's wild costume party, complete with a live, tiger, Zoe's evil co-worker Penny uses the prank to get Jane fired, and it's up to Zoe to get her friend's job back.

items.title: S02E08 - Desperately Seeking Zoe
items.summary: Duncan tosses Jack out of the apartment because of his messiness and his extremely annoying girlfriend, and Doug moves in. Meanwhile, Zoe finds adventure in the world of personal ads when her suede jacket attracts attention all over New York.

infolabels.title: Desperately Seeking Zoe
infolabels.plot: Duncan tosses Jack out of the apartment because of his messiness and his extremely annoying girlfriend, and Doug moves in. Meanwhile, Zoe finds adventure in the world of personal ads when her suede jacket attracts attention all over New York.

items.title: S02E09 - Tall, Dark and Duncan's Boss
items.summary: Zoe creates an embarrassing situation when her fantasies about Duncan's boss become public knowledge.

infolabels.title: Tall, Dark and Duncan's Boss
infolabels.plot: Zoe creates an embarrassing situation when her fantasies about Duncan's boss become public knowledge.

items.title: S02E10 - My Dinner with Andy
items.summary: Duncan's boss arranges a romantic getaway; Jack dates a lingerie model; Doug baby-sits a fish.

infolabels.title: My Dinner with Andy
infolabels.plot: Duncan's boss arranges a romantic getaway; Jack dates a lingerie model; Doug baby-sits a fish.

items.title: S02E11 - Too Much Pressure
items.summary: When Zoe conducts a psychology experiment to study the effects of stress, she uses Jack and Jane as her subjects, but the siblings wind up skewing her results when they start to get along.

infolabels.title: Too Much Pressure
infolabels.plot: When Zoe conducts a psychology experiment to study the effects of stress, she uses Jack and Jane as her subjects, but the siblings wind up skewing her results when they start to get along.

items.title: S02E12 - Party Girls
items.summary: Things get tense in the apartment when Zoe and Jane decide to throw a party to impress a handsome man but can't quite agree on how it should be handled, so they end up at each other's throats. Doug, meanwhile, starts dating a girl to get his play produced.

infolabels.title: Party Girls
infolabels.plot: Things get tense in the apartment when Zoe and Jane decide to throw a party to impress a handsome man but can't quite agree on how it should be handled, so they end up at each other's throats. Doug, meanwhile, starts dating a girl to get his play produced.
